nodes.label: Personal Portfolio (Astro site)
nodes.rationale: Multilingual Astro static site on GitHub Pages showcasing interactive demos of past projects; React islands hydrate per demo.

nodes.label: Astro 5 Static Site (GH Pages)
nodes.rationale: astro build emits pure HTML/CSS/JS; GitHub Pages serves it, no Node runtime in production.

nodes.label: React 19 Islands
nodes.rationale: Each demo hydrates as an island with client:visible so JS ships only when the component scrolls into view.

nodes.label: Three Sources of Truth
nodes.rationale: demo-services.json, demos.json, and section-ids.ts drive everything derived; consistency policed by structural tests.

nodes.label: demo-services Registry (SSOT)
nodes.rationale: Single registry of backends/ports drives the orchestrator, log-relay, iframe URLs, Makefile DEMO_PORTS, Sentry traced ports, and live-demos.spec.ts.

nodes.label: Live Docker Backend Demos
nodes.rationale: LiveAppEmbed iframes a Docker backend on localhost:<port>; on GH Pages it falls back to MockBanner since there is no backend.

nodes.label: i18n System (i18next + inlang)
nodes.rationale: Three locales (en/es/ca), path-based routing, build-time i18next init; three content patterns (A ui.json, B data triples, C per-demo).

nodes.label: i18n Parity Rule
nodes.rationale: Pattern-B sibling locale JSONs must stay lock-step (same length/fields/order); enforced by content-parity.test.ts.

nodes.label: Custom Debug Event Bus
nodes.rationale: One producer surface (src/lib/debug.ts) emitting CustomEvents; overlay, console, Sentry forwarder, and network tap subscribe independently.

nodes.label: Sentry Observability
nodes.rationale: Spotlight (local), self-hosted Sentry, or cloud free tier — mutually exclusive at the DSN level; one org for frontend + all backends.

nodes.label: Theming (themes + designs)
nodes.rationale: Orthogonal palette (data-theme) and layout flavor (data-design) axes, both persisted in localStorage.

nodes.label: Custom event-bus over debug/consola/pino
nodes.rationale: ~1-2KB zero-dep bus chosen for smallest footprint, exact fit, and trivial mockability; heavier loggers (pino, consola) rejected as overkill.

nodes.label: Sentry as sink, not logging foundation
nodes.rationale: The custom bus is the foundation; Sentry SDK is one of several sinks so production observability does not dictate the in-page logging API.
nodes.norm_label: sentry as sink, not logging foundation

nodes.label: session_id cross-stack trace correlation
nodes.rationale: Browser and backend events share one session_id so a Sentry filter reconstructs the full cross-stack trace.
